MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Vivian Leung Lerche, specially appearing for Hunts and Henriques, Tel. 408.362.2270, for plaintiffs;
Roger Travis, in pro per, Tel. 415.678.0029, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court modifies its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's Claim Of Exemption is granted in part / denied in part. Defendant shall pay $200/pay period for payment on account of this debt. The Court shall prepare the order and mail to parties. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
